results.title: Hrithik spotted at Mumbai airport with Saba Azad, sons
results.description: Bollywood star Hrithik Roshan returned to Mumbai early Tuesday with girlfriend Saba Azad and his sons Hrehaan and Hridhaan after a family vacation. The actor was spotted at the airport in a casual all-black outfit, accompanied by Saba and his children.
